content_body:
Blue Ridge, Georgia is without a doubt one of the most ideal vacation spots in the Southeast. Located just 90 miles north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge promises to give you an fun-filled vacation you won't forget. Due to its boutique nature, your vacation is highly customizable for all travel reasons, whether that be a family vacation, girls' trip, or couples retreat. 

As a locally owned and operated company for 20+ years, our Blue Ridge Vacation Specialists are here to help you maximize your experience. Call (706) 432-2140 and let us help you plan your getaway!


Cohutta Sunset

Blue Ridge is a favorite for families both large and small due to the myriad of fun things to do with kids in the great outdoors! Offering a vast variety of activities and places to explore, you can enoy water activities (tubing/kayaking, fishing and whitewater rafting), hiking and biking for outdoor enthusiasts, or shopping and dining in downtown Blue Ridge. Just 90 minutes north of Atlanta, the Blue Ridge, GA mountains offer something for everyone. Take a look at the main highlights below!

Best Water Activities in Blue Ridge, GA


If there is one element Blue Ridge is familiar with, it is water. The beautiful Toccoa River offers pristine clear waters for rafting, tubing/kayaking, fishing, and swimming. Known as the Trout Capital of Georgia, fly-fishing is a must-do for all ages. Check out our favorite fly-fishing guides, offering beginner instruction and guiding avid veteran fishermen on public and private waters.

Just 30 minutes from Blue Ridge, check out whitewater rafting on the exciting Ocoee River, the site of the 1996 Summer Olympics. Perfect for boating, kayaking, paddleboarding, and more is Lake Blue Ridge. 

Explore the North Georgia Mountains


Blue Ridge showcases some of nature's most beautiful sights, just waiting for you to come see. From the breathtaking Blue Ridge Mountains to the Chattahoochee National Forest, North Georgia is truly a nature-lover's paradise. Hike the famous Appalachian Trail or visit stunning waterfalls—one of our nearby favorites is Fall Branch Falls! Anywhere you turn, you'll uncover breathtaking North Georgia mountain beauty.

Things to Do With Kids in Blue Ridge GA

In addition to all the fun outdoor activities in the North GA Mountains, kids will love gem mining and outdoor miniature golf at Lilly Pad Village. If you're staying in our luxury Aska Escape Lodge, you are just a short walk from the Lilly Pad.

Head into Downtown Blue Ridge and spend the day visiting Vertigo Pinball, Hucks' General Store, and 2nd Story Entertainment. Take a ride on the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway to the twin mountain towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN where more shopping awaits plus the opportunity to stand in two states at one time!

After dinner, catch a movie at the historic Swan Drive-In Theater. Explore all the Family Fun here! 

Boutique Shops in Blue Ridge, GA


Get lost in the abundance of antique stores, boutiques, and one-of-a-kind specialty shops in downtown Blue Ridge. There is truly something for every shopper, like clothing boutiques, mountain outfitters, home decor, art galleries, and more. So much fun is packed on Main Street and beyond!

North Georgia Dining, Wineries, and Breweries


For foodie fans, enjoy a lovely dining experience at some of our favorite restaurants. Don't miss out on giving our area award-winning vineyards a try! Bear Claw Vineyards is close to downtown. While exploring Main Street, make sure to check out the best breweries - Grumpy Old Men, Angry Hops, and more. 

Best Places to Stay in Blue Ridge, GA

As the perfect home base for your Blue Ridge vacation, our luxury cabin rentals offer everything you need to maximize your comfort. Our fully-stocked kitchens, luxury bedrooms, and jam-packed game rooms will leave you wanting to return year after year. 

Choose from:

  • Riverfront cabins with fishing access.
  • Lake view cabins near Lake Blue Ridge.
  • Mountain view cabins with scenic vistas.
  • Pet-friendly cabins for the whole family.

And more! 

Offering cabin rentals for every occasion, Cabin Rentals of Georgia is your answer to the perfect mountain getaway! Reserve online or give us a call to find your next vacation rental. (706) 432-2140
title: Blue Ridge, Georgia Activities
